name: edma
description: EDMA Layer-2 — Ethereum L2 for Real-World Assets with Proof-of-Verification

scripts.test:gas: cd packages/contracts && REPORT_GAS=true npx hardhat test
scripts.deploy:local: cd packages/contracts && npx hardhat run script/Deploy.s.js --network localhost
scripts.deploy:sepolia: cd packages/contracts && npx hardhat run script/Deploy.s.js --network sepolia
